docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE MICHAEL MAU. FILED BY JEON, RAYMOND
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY JEON, RAYMOND AS TO DEFENDANT BUBLAVY, MARION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-22-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JEON, RAYMOND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUBLAVY, MARION $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,050.00, DEFENDANT MARION BUBLAVY FAILED TO APPEAR AT THE HEARING. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES NONE LISTED. SERVED MAR-31-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BUBLAVY, MARION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-22-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-22-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHAEL L. MAU. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL L. MAU. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-22-2015 - JUDGMENT.
